_purpose: LOGH VII character-creation ability SEED (house-rule). The creation FORM's per-ability BASE (기준) is a CLIENT-LOCAL widget default (no pre-creation S->C message seeds it keyed to origin), so the live form shows all 8 abilities = 0. The server cannot feed the form, but it CAN stamp these BASE values onto the registered character so a created character has non-zero, canon-shaped stats (0x0323 record ability_8 @0x188, and the working lobbyCharacters entry).
_design: Derived from content/roster/ivex-abilities.json (181 IV EX chars, scale 0-100, mean ~50). Archetype read: combat officer 指揮~78/機動~76/防御~77, staff 政治~87/情報~80, recruit ~50. BASE 40 every ability + per-origin modifiers, clamp 0-100. The player additionally distributes a BONUS pool of 50 (the 가산/added column in the client); the server provides the BASE/기준 only.
_ability_order: PCP: tochi(統率) seiji(政治) unei(運営) joho(情報) ; MCP: shiki(指揮) kido(機動) kogeki(攻撃) bogyo(防御)
_origin_enum: Origins map to the 0x1008 wire fields power(faction)@0x05 + blood(origin)@0x06. power: 0/1 = 帝国(empire), 2 = 同盟(alliance) per the live-capture (power=2 alliance) and the test convention (power=1 empire). blood indexes the origin within the faction. The resolver matches power+blood; an unrecognized pair falls back to BASE-only (all 40).
